description_of_work: THE 390 WASHINGTON STREET BUILDING 5 PROJECT IS PART OF THE LARGER DEVELOPMENT OF 390 WASHINGTON STREET AND 23 FISKE PLACE.THE DEVELOPMENT OF 390 WASHINGTON STREET AND 23 FISKE PLACE ENCOMPASSES THE PARTIAL DEMOLITION OF AN PREEXISTING NONCONFORMING EXISTING TWO-FAMILY RESIDENTIAL STRUCTURE AND ITS CONVERSION TO A SINGLE FAMILY. FIVE ADDITIONAL NEW CONSTRUCTION UNITS WILL BE BUILT ON THE LOT. THE DEVELOPMENT CONSISTS OF THE FOLLOWING STRUCTURES:BUILDING 1-2: A TWO-FAMILY STRUCTURE. SIDE-BY-SIDE UNITS SEPARATED BY A FIRE RATED WALL. THREE STORIES ABOVE GRADE. BASEMENTS PROTECTED TO THE 1% LTFE BY ALL WINDOW SILLS/WELLS BEING ABOVE THE LTFE OF 23.5. ALL ROOFS ≥ 82 SRI OR BETTER. ONE UNCOVERED PARKING SPACE, ONE COVERED PARKING SPACE. COMPLIANT WITH ZONING. SPRINKLER SYSTEM AS REQUIRED BY FIRE DEPARTMENT.BUILDING 3-4: A TWO-FAMILY STRUCTURE. SIDE-BY-SIDE UNITS SEPARATED BY A FIRE RATED WALL. THREE STORIES ABOVE GRADE. BASEMENTS PROTECTED TO THE 1% LTFE BY ALL WINDOW SILLS/WELLS BEING ABOVE THE LTFE OF 23.5. ALL ROOFS ≥ 82 SRI OR BETTER. ONE UNCOVERED PARKING SPACE, ONE COVERED PARKING SPACE. COMPLIANT WITH ZONING. SPRINKLER SYSTEM AS REQUIRED BY FIRE DEPARTMENT.BUILDING 5: A SINGLE FAMILY STRUCTURE. THREE STORIES ABOVE GRADE. BASEMENT PROTECTED TO THE 1% LTFE BY ALL WINDOW SILLS/WELLS BEING ABOVE THE LTFE OF 23.5. ALL ROOFS ≥ 82 SRI OR BETTER. ONE COVERED PARKING SPACE. COMPLIANT WITH ZONING. SPRINKLER SYSTEM AS REQUIRED BY FIRE DEPARTMENT.BUILDING 6: EXISTING STRUCTURE SINGLE FAMILY. TWO AND A HALF STORIES ABOVE GRADE. BASEMENT PROTECTED TO THE 1% LTFE BY ALL WINDOW SILLS/WELLS BEING ABOVE THE LTFE OF 23.5. ALL LOW SLOPE ROOFS ≥ 82 SRI OR BETTER. ONE UNCOVERED PARKING SPACE. PREEXISTING NONCONFORMING, BUT ALL NEW WORK COMPLIANT WITH ZONING. DEMOLITION PERMIT ALREADY OBTAINED.
employment_arrangement: I am a general contractor and I have hired the sub-contractors.
isd_approved_description: (Building 5) Build new single family structure. Finish basement, add window well. Cantilevered covered parking on left side. Fossil fuel free, all electric energy path.

debris_removal_location: 266 Rindge Ave Cambridge, MA by Consigli Construction Co., Inc.
description_of_work: Installation of temporary trailers to use as children's daycare center during construction of the Cambridge Housing Authority Jefferson Park Federal project.  The current Headstart daycare is being demolished as a part of this project and will be relocated to these trailers for the duration of the project.  At the conclusion of the project, the daycare will be moved back into the new building being built under Building Permit BLDC-195503-2023.
employment_arrangement: I am a general contractor and I have hired the sub-contractors.
